title: Anthropic CEO Reopens Pentagon Talks After AI Clash
description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei resumes tense talks with the Pentagon after an AI dispute, raising new questions about military AI deals and tech ethics today.

title: Morgan Stanley Lowers Tempus AI (NASDAQ:TEM) Price Target to $70.00
description: Tempus AI (NASDAQ:TEM – Get Free Report) had its target price decreased by investment analysts at Morgan Stanley from $85.00 to $70.00 in a research note issued on Tuesday,Benzinga reports. The firm presently has an “overweight” rating on the stock. Morgan Stanley’s price target suggests a potential upside of 36.48% from the stock’s previous close. [...]

title: AI Challenges IT Sector Real Estate, Autos Show Positive Outlooks

title: The startup uses AI to add mini-games into apps
description: At just one cent per play, DailyPlay uses AI to help brands add Duolingo-like challenges and "side quests" to their own apps.

title: Bitcoin Miners Trigger Market Uncertainty as $8 Billion Holdings Face Strategic Sell-Off for AI Pivot
description: BitcoinWorldBitcoin Miners Trigger Market Uncertainty as $8 Billion Holdings Face Strategic Sell-Off for AI PivotMajor Bitcoin mining corporations controlling approximately $8 billion in BTC reserves are implementing strategic sell-offs, creating significant market uncertainty as they reallocate capital toward artificial intelligence computing infrastructure. According to Bloomberg’s recent analysis, this fundamental shift represents a departure from traditional mining economics and could potentially influence Bitcoin’s price trajectory throughout 2025. The trend signals [...]This post Bitcoin Miners Trigger Market Uncertainty as $8 Billion Holdings Face Strategic Sell-Off for AI Pivot first appeared on BitcoinWorld.
